histogram.name: PerformanceControls.BatterySaver.BubbleAction
histogram.summary: Logged on each battery saver mode bubble close indicating whether the bubble is dismissed (either by the user or by the system e.g. closed at shutdown) or used it to turn off battery saver mode for current session. This will be used to measure the efficacy of the bubble message and the number of users that interact with the battery saver toolbar button.
